name: East Brady Pickleball Courts
description: East Brady Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in East Brady, PA. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Freeport Community
description: Come play pickleball at Freeport Community in Freeport, PA! There are 6 outdoor asphalt and acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Kittanning High School Tennis Courts
description: Kittanning High School Tennis Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Kittanning, PA. There are 3 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — Owned by the YMCA

name: Richard G. Snyder YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Richard G. Snyder YMCA in Kittanning, PA! There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: West Kittanning Fire Hall/playground
description: West Kittanning Fire Hall/playground is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Kittanning, PA. There are 2 courts. 1 is outdoors and 1 is indoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.
